subject: (no subject)
body:
I put on hold later tickets for brice and karen that leave albuquerque at 1:45pm in case you want them to come. They said they wouldn't be ready to take the 8am since they hadn't heard anything and didn't pack yet. 

Hope you had fun tonight!!
